entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Under-utilized cereal crop with superior resilience to drought and heat stress

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Important cereal crop used for comparative study of drought resilience

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water, used to test crop resilience

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by high temperatures

entities.name: COMPARATIVE PHYSIOLOGICAL SCREENING
entities.description: Method used to evaluate physiological responses of different genotypes

entities.name: LARGE SCALE PROTEOMICS
entities.description: Method used to analyze the entire set of proteins expressed by a genome

entities.name: ROOT MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: Physical structure of roots, regulated differently under stress

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC MACHINERY
entities.description: Biological system for photosynthesis, regulated differently under stress

entities.name: STAY-GREEN PHENOTYPE
entities.description: Ability of a plant to maintain green leaves during drought stress

entities.name: TISSUE-SPECIFIC PROTEOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method of analyzing proteins in specific plant parts like leaves, roots, and seeds

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to study evolutionary relationships among species

entities.name: ORTHOLOGUES
entities.description: Genes in different species that evolved from a common ancestral gene

entities.description: Cereal crop used for phylogenetic comparison

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX

entities.description: Ability of an organism to change its biochemical processes in response to the environment
